response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: N/A. No lyrics provided in reference JSON as the video contains spoken dialogue and visual text, not vocal music. 2. JSON Usage: The reference scene breakdown was used to identify key segments. Manual transcription and translation were performed for all spoken dialogue and prominent on-screen text. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timestamps are precisely anchored to the audio vocalizations and visual appearances. Rapid speech was handled with instantaneous transitions, and silence during the outro was filled with subtitles for visual text elements.

subtitles.original: （食べる音）んー、んー。
subtitles.english: (Eating sounds) Mhm, mhm.

subtitles.original: ということでね。えー、皆さん、本日はこよりちゃんの
subtitles.english: So then, everyone, today was Koyori-chan's...

subtitles.original: 本格スパイスカレー作り、初めての本格スパイスカレー作りを見ていただき
subtitles.english: ...authentic spice curry making, thank you for watching my first authentic spice curry making!

subtitles.original: ありがとうございました！
subtitles.english: Thank you very much!

subtitles.original: 大成功いたしましたので、
subtitles.english: It was a huge success,

subtitles.original: ね、こちらですね、あのー、
subtitles.english: so, this one, um...

subtitles.original: ぜひ真似して作ってみていただければと
subtitles.english: please try making it yourself by following this,

subtitles.original: 思いまーす！
subtitles.english: I hope you will!

subtitles.original: そして、え、あの、ハッシュタグ「#こより実験中」をつけて
subtitles.english: And, um, please use the hashtag #KoyoriExperimenting...

subtitles.original: 「こよちゃんカレー超期待」は…
subtitles.english: ...to say "Koyo-chan's curry is super promising"...

subtitles.original: 食べ散らかし汚いから、
subtitles.english: Wait, the way I'm eating is a mess, so...

subtitles.original: 「こよちゃんカレー大成功！」
subtitles.english: ..."Koyo-chan's curry was a huge success!"

subtitles.original: 「初めてで本格スパイスカレーを成功させるなんて、すごい！」
subtitles.english: "To succeed with authentic spice curry on your first try, you're amazing!"

subtitles.original: っつって、画面のスクショも載せて、
subtitles.english: Say that, and post a screenshot of the screen,

subtitles.original: えー、いっぱい感想をね、呟いて、
subtitles.english: and tweet lots of your thoughts,

subtitles.original: あの、ちょっとオーディション…
subtitles.english: um, to help me pass the audition...

subtitles.original: オーディション合格できるように、ちょっと応援をよろしくお願いします！
subtitles.english: Please support me so I can pass the audition! (Laughs)

subtitles.original: オーディションではない。はい、すみません。
subtitles.english: It's not an audition. Yes, sorry.

subtitles.original: ちょっとたまたまね、タイミングがものすごく合ってしまったがゆえに、
subtitles.english: The timing just happened to be really coincidental, so...

subtitles.original: あの、いっぱい弄っちゃってすみませんでした。
subtitles.english: ...um, I'm sorry for teasing you so much.

subtitles.original: ゴエさん、すみませんでした。よかったら、あの、今後ともよろしくお願いいたします。
subtitles.english: Goe-san, I'm sorry. I look forward to working with you in the future.

subtitles.original: ということで、こよりはちょっと温かいうちにカレー食べたいんで、
subtitles.english: So, Koyori wants to eat her curry while it's still warm,

subtitles.original: 締めたいと思いまーす！
subtitles.english: ...so I'll wrap things up!

subtitles.original: チャンネル登録、高評価まだの方はポチッと押してください。よろしくお願いします。
subtitles.english: If you haven't subscribed or liked the video yet, please click the button. Thank you!

subtitles.original: いや、マジでよかった。チキンのトマト煮で終わらなくてよかった。
subtitles.english: No, but really, it was great. I'm glad it didn't just end with tomato-stewed chicken.

subtitles.original: 失敗からのゴリ押しでの成功、素晴らしい。ありがとう！
subtitles.english: Pushing through failure to success is wonderful. Thank you!

subtitles.original: ほな、またねー！
subtitles.english: Well then, see you later!

subtitles.original: Thank you for watching!
subtitles.english: [Visual: Thank you for watching!]

subtitles.original: Subscribe to my channel / Click The Like button ♡
subtitles.english: [Visual: Subscribe to my channel / Click The Like button ♡]

subtitles.original: Follow me on Twitter @HakuiKoyori
subtitles.english: [Visual: Follow me on Twitter @HakuiKoyori]

subtitles.original: See you next time!
subtitles.english: [Visual: See you next time!]

subtitles.original: また会いに来てね！
subtitles.english: Come see me again!

subtitles.original: クロワッサンはそのまま食べた方がやっぱうまいわ。
subtitles.english: Croissants really do taste better on their own.

subtitles.original: カレーはカレー、クロワッサンはクロワッサン。
subtitles.english: Curry is curry, and croissants are croissants.

subtitles.original: いやな、ちょっと気持ちがわかったわ。えへ。
subtitles.english: Yeah, I think I understand the feeling now. Ehe.
